description: Design (spec only) a first-class contract-compliant per-iteration model schedule for deep-loop fan-out: an operator can request a fixed-count heterogeneous schedule (e.g. nine iterations on minimax MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed then one on claude-opus-4-8) through /deep:start-review-loop, /deep:start-research-loop, and the shared deep-loop-runtime. Models the schedule as ordered single-executor lineages (bands) over the existing fan-out machinery via a thin iterationPlan flag that desugars one-to-one into ordered lineages plus a minimal sequencing hint reusing step_fanout_spawn, fanout-pool.cjs, fanout-run.cjs, fanout-salvage.cjs, fanout-merge.cjs, and executor-config.ts. Produces the schema, routing, audit, merge-precedence, and command-surface design; implementation is this phase's future work.
